scenarios.prompt: John from ABC customer called and wants 100 corr-roll for 100 USD a piece. He will send a truck to pick up at our demo warehouse next week Tuesday.
expected: Assistant resolves or asks to disambiguate customer and product.
Create draft sales order persists one structured SalesOrderLine.
Sales order detail shows source request, parser snapshot, reply draft, and assistant audit event.
User can edit the line/reply and approve the assistant intake.

scenarios.prompt: Someone wants 25 corr-roll next Tuesday at 80 USD.
expected: Assistant refuses to create a draft until a customer can be matched.
No sales order is created silently.
Clarification or not-found message explains what detail is missing.

scenarios.prompt: Use an imported open email thread with a linked CRM account and a product/quantity/price request.
expected: Create draft SO from email action persists structured SalesOrderLine data.
Email thread links to the draft SO.
Sales order detail shows the customer reply draft and assistant timeline evidence.
User can approve or mark the intake as needs changes.
